description:
Introduce:
Enjoy the perfect comfort, durability and portability of this set of 2 mesh folding beach chairs. Designed for outdoor enthusiasts, these foldable chairs are perfect for beach trips, camping, fishing, poolside lounging, or any outdoor adventure. Featuring a powder-coated steel frame and breathable, fade-resistant webbing for durability. The compact, foldable design makes it easy to store and transport, while the vibrant colors add a touch of fun to your outdoor setup. Whether you're relaxing in the yard, having a barbecue, or on a camping trip, these chairs provide excellent support and comfort.

Features:
1. Spacious and comfortable seating: The 21-inch-wide seat provides extra space for a more comfortable casual experience, ensuring you can relax for hours without feeling cramped, making it perfect for long beach days or outdoor gatherings.
2. Durable and stable construction: These beach chairs have a sturdy powder-coated steel frame and a durable, fade-resistant mesh structure for extended outdoor use. A-frame steel construction ensures a weight capacity of up to 260 pounds.
3. Lightweight and portable: These foldable chairs weigh only 8.2 pounds, making them very portable. They have a compact folded size of 34.3 x 24.4 x 2.8 inches, making them easy to store and carry for your outdoor adventures.
4. No assembly required: These chairs are fully assembled, so you can enjoy relaxation in no time. Just unfold it and you're comfortable – no tools required!
5. Bright and versatile design: With bright colors and comfortable and spacious seats, these chairs are perfect for a variety of outdoor activities, from beach days to backyard barbecues and camping trips.

Specification:
1.Material: Steel, PP webbing
2. Color: yellow and green
3. Unfolded size: (24.4 x 23.6 x 36.6) inches / (62 x 60 x 93) cm
4. Folded size: (24.4 x 2.8 x 34.3) inches / (62 x 7 x 87) cm
5. Weight: 8.2lbs / 3.7kg

Package includes:
2 x Folding Beach Chairs
